meaning: n.期待,预料,指望,展望,[数]期望(值)
examples: There was an air of expectation and great curiosity.
I applied for the post more in hope than expectation.
We are confident in our expectation of a full recovery.
The expectation of increased spending on roads and railways has helped to lift raw-material prices.
It's like a child, raised with hope rather than expectation, love rather than fiscal projection.
